cards.back: An iterative and incremental software development methodology that emphasizes flexibility, collaboration, and rapid delivery
A linear and sequential software development process that emphasizes phase-by-phase development and minimal interdependence
A software development approach that involves breaking down the development process into smaller, manageable chunks, and repeating the process in a cyclical manner
A software development approach that involves developing a small part of the system first, and then expanding to other components in a series of incremental phases
A software development approach that involves dividing the development process into distinct phases, each with its own set of tasks and deliverables
